An Open-Jaw Family Expedition · Summer MMXXVI

AUSTRIA
in ten days

Vienna · Salzburg · The Lakes & Glaciers of the Hohe Tauern

IN London LHR ✈ Vienna◆ 5 nights on the Zeller See◆ OUT Salzburg / Munich ✈ London
City & Culture Heat-relief day — lake or alpine cooling Cable car / glacier
01
Mon 20 JulVIENNA

Schönbrunn Palace

Land at LHR → Wien. Roll straight to the imperial summer palace — gilded halls, the Gloriette hill, and a hedge maze the kids can get lost in (on purpose).

LHR ✈ VIEPalace + maze
02
Tue 21 JulVIENNA

The Prater Funfair

A full day of the Wurstelprater: the 1897 Riesenrad big wheel, bumper cars, and ice cream. Low-stress, high-delight — built for a 5, 8 and 11-year-old.

RiesenradAll ages
03
HEAT RELIEF
Wed 22 JulVIENNA

Museum + Danube Swim

Dinosaurs and meteorites at the Natural History Museum in the cool of the morning, then escape the city heat with an afternoon swim at the Alte Donau beaches.

NHM WienDanube swim
04
Thu 23 JulSALZBURG

Fortress & Mirabell

Train west to Salzburg. Ride the funicular up to Hohensalzburg fortress for the view, then wander the Mirabell gardens — yes, the Do-Re-Mi steps.

VIE → SZGFortress + gardens
05
HEAT RELIEF
Fri 24 JulZELL AM SEE

Lake Day, Zeller See

Settle into your Zell am See base for five nights. First day is a pure lake day: swim, pedalo, and lakeside shade on the cool, clear Zeller See.

Base: 5 ntsLake swim
06
HEAT RELIEF
Sat 25 JulZELL AM SEE

Schmittenhöhe Cable Car

Float up the Schmittenhöhe by cable car to 1,965 m. Cool mountain air, easy family trails, and a panorama of thirty glaciated peaks.

Cable car2,000 m air
07
HEAT RELIEF
Sun 26 JulKAPRUN

Kitzsteinhorn Glacier

Up to the glacier at 3,000 m — snow in July. Snowball fights in shorts, the ice tunnel gallery, and viewing platforms over a frozen world.

Glacier liftSnow in July
08
HEAT RELIEF
Mon 27 JulKRIMML

Krimml Waterfalls

Europe's tallest waterfall, 380 m of falling water. The shaded forest path climbs alongside the spray — naturally air-conditioned the whole way up.

Forest trailWaterfall mist
09
HEAT RELIEF
Tue 28 JulZELL AM SEE

Free Lake Day

A flex day back at the lake. Repeat a favourite, rent bikes on the flat lakeshore loop, or do nothing at all by the water. Pack for tomorrow.

Lakeshore loopLake day
10
Wed 29 JulDEPARTURE

Fly Home

Open-jaw pays off: short transfer to Salzburg or Munich airport and fly back to London. No backtracking to Vienna — just one last alpine view.

SZG/MUC ✈ LHRHome
10Days
3Bases
6Cooling Days
3,029Metres up · glacier
5·8·11Ages aboard

Open-jaw routing flies you into Vienna and home from Salzburg or Munich, so no day is spent retracing your steps. Six of ten days are built around water or altitude — the lake, the cable cars, the glacier, the waterfall — to keep a July trip comfortable for young legs.

Photographs: Wikimedia Commons · For family planning use
